name: build-gate-visual-review
description: Renders project state as HTML for user visual review before build phase

positive_triggers.input: Show me what we're about to build before any code
positive_triggers.reason: User wants visual confirmation before build

positive_triggers.input: Generate an HTML review of the current project state

negative_triggers.reason: No UI, no visual gate needed

negative_triggers.input: Just write the code, no review needed

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'Show me what we're about to build'
expected_behavior: Agent verifies HTML Anything installed (clone + pnpm install + pnpm dev)
Agent compiles build-context.md from task_plan.md + spec.md + design-spec.md + findings.md summary
Agent picks appropriate template (magazine / deck / data-report / prototype)
Agent invokes HTML Anything CLI/API to generate HTML
Agent presents file path + how to open (browser / web UI)
Agent waits for user approval before build phase

behavioral_evals.scenario: User says: 'Looks good, proceed to build'
expected_behavior: Agent records [build-gate] review → user: approve in progress.md
If user had said 'modify': agent updates spec/plan and regenerates HTML

notes: Behavioral evals are warning-level until promoted via upstream issue tracker.
